summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sonar AI app builder E2B VS Code provisioning feature. Successfully verified real-time provisioning flow, CostPreviewModal UI, backend APIs, and user authentication. The core E2B integration is working correctly with real status updates.

critical_bugs.issue: LLM authentication error - OPENAI_API_KEY not configured
critical_bugs.impact: Code generation fails after clicking Generate button

integration_issues.issue: Login session not persisting properly between page interactions

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with 'sonar' branding
User registration with unique email (newtest456@test.com format) works
CostPreviewModal appears when clicking Build after authentication
All 4 provisioning steps visible: Loading cloud environment, Allocating resources, Configuring environment, Starting agents
Real E2B provisioning works - steps progress with actual status updates
Step 1 'Loading cloud environment' completes within 3 seconds as expected
Generate button shows disabled state initially, becomes active after step 1
Backend GET /api/sandbox/vscode/provision/{id}/status endpoint returns real status
AppBuilder loads after clicking Generate button
Backend API endpoints work (12/12 tests passed)
E2B VS Code environment creation API works
Pre-provisioning and attachment flow works correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Configure OPENAI_API_KEY or EMERGENT_LLM_KEY environment variable to fix code generation. The E2B provisioning feature is working correctly but LLM integration needs API key configuration.
